label: Detection & Response
description: EDR, XDR, and incident response capabilities

label: SIEM
description: Security information and event management features

label: Managed SOC / MDR
description: Managed detection and response and SOC services

label: Deployment model
description: Cloud, on-premises, or hybrid deployment options

label: Standard data retention
description: Out of the box timeframe for data retention, including raw logs and telemetry
promptGuidance: Use these score bands for standard data retention (included at no extra cost, raw logs/telemetry from endpoint, network, cloud, etc.): Score 5: 12 months or 365 days. Score 4: 6 months. Score 3: 90 days. Score 2: below 90 days. Score 1: Under 30 days or retention only as a paid add-on. Assign the score that matches the platform's standard retention; do not give 4 or 5 for 90 days or less. Options to extend retention beyond the default can be mentioned in the note.
